title: Enable Managed Columns to interact with Workflows

posts.author: tom2 (Tom Probst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Love Managed Columns and Love Workflows, however Managed Columns is not a column that can be called and used within Workflows.

Both brilliant but without each other a total shame! Please can you get these working together. Thank you

What are you trying to achieve

I’m using a workflow to create a new item on another board. One of the columns we use on both is a drop down, and to standardise the data it’s a managed column.

Yes, automations is a fine way and I’m able to achieve the same initial function, however Workflows offers so much more and I could achieve the full “recipe” in Workflows. Instead I’ve got an automation doing part, setting a passive status which is then the trigger to run the rest of the recipe via a Worklflow.
